queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of lacking a checking account on borrower default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Determinants of default: The influence of critical or alternative existing credit histories on reducing overall credit risk.
Credit risk drivers: An empirical investigation into how extended loan duration correlates with decreased borrower default probability.
